opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: Ruined couch → showroom sofa for $47 (pets can't destroy this)
opportunities.before_state: Faded, scratched, pet-hair-covered sofa with visible stains and claw marks
opportunities.after_state: Sleek, clean, fitted sofa cover that looks like new upholstery — pet hair wipes right off
opportunities.why_now: Peak spring shedding season drives massive pet-hair frustration searches, and sofa replacement costs are up — cover alternatives are surging as a budget solution.

opportunities.specific_product: Syruvia pull-out cabinet organizer drawer set
opportunities.before_state: Overcrowded lower cabinet with tumbling pots, lids everywhere, and wasted dead space
opportunities.after_state: Smooth-glide pull-out drawers with every item visible, accessible, and neatly tiered
opportunities.why_now: Spring cleaning momentum peaks in late May and kitchen organization is the #1 searched home category — Syruvia's 20% commission makes this extremely profitable per conversion.

opportunities.specific_product: Eli & Elm side sleeper contour pillow
opportunities.transformation_hook: Waking up with neck pain → first pain-free morning for $89
opportunities.before_state: Flat, yellowed pillow causing neck stiffness, poor sleep, and morning grogginess
opportunities.after_state: Ergonomic U-shaped pillow that cradles the neck — visible posture difference, crisp white bedroom aesthetic
opportunities.why_now: Sleep wellness content is outperforming general home content in watch time, and pain-relief framing converts at 2–3x standard product Reels — 20% commission on an $89 ticket item is strong.

opportunities.specific_product: Best Choice Products mid-century accent chair
opportunities.transformation_hook: Dead corner → styled reading nook for $129
opportunities.before_state: Empty awkward corner with a cheap folding chair or bare floor, making the room feel unfinished
opportunities.after_state: Cohesive, Instagram-worthy reading nook with accent chair, throw, and side table — full room transformation
opportunities.why_now: Post-spring-refresh spending on single statement furniture pieces spikes in May as people finalize room overhauls started in April — corner makeovers are a proven high-save Reels format.

opportunities.transformation_hook: Cluttered bathroom → spa-like storage for $45 (no drilling)
opportunities.before_state: Products scattered on toilet tank, counters overflowing, zero vertical space utilized
opportunities.after_state: Freestanding ladder shelf above toilet with rolled towels, plants, and organized baskets — boutique hotel look
opportunities.why_now: Bathroom flips are the fastest-growing sub-format in home Reels due to small space = dramatic visual change ratio, and no-drill installs remove the biggest purchase objection.
